paper_title: Refinement of a conjecture on positive square energy of graphs
summary: Conjecture 9.2 of arXiv:2506.07264 characterises the equality cases in the Elphick–Farber–Goldberg–Wocjan lower bound: s+(G)=n-1 if and only if G is a tree, and s-(G)=n-1 if and only if G is a tree or a complete graph. No follow-up paper resolving or partially resolving this conjecture was found in a search of the literature up to May 2026, roughly 11 months after the paper was posted.
search_queries: arxiv 2506.07264 positive square energy graphs Akbari Mohar
positive square energy graphs tree complete graph s+(G) s-(G) characterization 2025 2026
square energy graph s+(G) n-1 tree characterization equality case 2025 2026 arxiv
notes: No follow-up found. The conjecture is an open-problems section item (Section 9) of a June 2025 paper; related work on p-energies (arXiv:2604.15656, arXiv:2410.09830) addresses generalisations to p≠2 but not the specific equality characterisation for square energy. Absence of follow-up is consistent with the conjecture being very recent.
